summary: GW38 final gameweek 2025/26. 2 confirmed out: Raya (Arsenal rotation, not injury) and Haaland (World Cup rest, bench slot 13). 4 doubts: Gabriel (leg injury, Arsenal rotation), Gvardiol (City bench, end-of-season rotation), Mateta (Palace bench, rotation), Kluivert (Bournemouth bench).
